quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Cfn: A `TopBottomFilter` filters values that are at the top or the bottom.

quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Agg.Description: The aggregation and sort configuration of the top bottom filter.

quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Col.Description: The column that the filter is applied to.

quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Fil.Description: An identifier that uniquely identifies a filter within a dashboard, analysis, or template.

quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Lim.Description: The number of items to include in the top bottom filter results.

quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Par.Description: The parameter whose value should be used for the filter value.

quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Tim.Description: The level of time precision that is used to aggregate `DateTime` values.
quicksight.dashboard.topbottomfilter.Tim.Allowed values: DAY | HOUR | MILLISECOND | MINUTE | MONTH | QUARTER | SECOND | WEEK | YEAR
